# Content Calendar Template

## Purpose
This template helps you plan, organize, and schedule social media content across all platforms. Use it to maintain consistent posting, align content with business goals, and ensure team coordination.

**Instructions:**
1. Duplicate this template for each month
2. Fill in content details 2-4 weeks in advance
3. Update status as content moves through workflow
4. Review and adjust based on performance weekly

## CONTENT TYPE LEGEND

| Code | Content Type | Description | Best For |
|------|--------------|-------------|----------|
| **EDU** | Educational | How-to, tips, tutorials, guides | Building authority |
| **ENT** | Entertainment | Humor, fun facts, memes, trends | Engagement & reach |
| **INS** | Inspirational | Quotes, success stories, motivation | Brand affinity |
| **PRO** | Promotional | Sales, offers, product features | Conversions |
| **BTS** | Behind-the-scenes | Process, team, culture | Humanizing brand |
| **UGC** | User-generated | Customer content, reviews, testimonials | Social proof |
| **NEW** | News/Updates | Company news, industry updates | Awareness |
| **ENG** | Engagement | Polls, questions, discussions | Community building |

---

## PLATFORM POSTING SCHEDULE

### Optimal Posting Times (Adjust based on analytics)

| Platform | Best Days | Best Times | Frequency |
|----------|-----------|------------|-----------|
| **LinkedIn** | Tue-Thu | 8-10 AM, 12 PM | 3-5x/week |
| **Instagram** | Mon-Fri | 11 AM-1 PM, 7-9 PM | 4-7x/week |
| **Facebook** | Mon-Fri | 1-3 PM | 3-5x/week |
| **X/Twitter** | Mon-Fri | 8-10 AM, 12 PM, 5-6 PM | 3-5x/day |
| **TikTok** | Tue-Thu | 7-9 AM, 7-11 PM | 3-5x/week |
| **YouTube** | Thu-Sun | 2-4 PM | 1-3x/week |
| **Pinterest** | Any | 8-11 PM | 5-10x/week |

---

## CONTENT WORKFLOW CHECKLIST

### Content Creation Process
- [ ] **Ideation:** Topic brainstormed and approved
- [ ] **Research:** Facts checked, sources verified
- [ ] **Copywriting:** Caption/text written
- [ ] **Visual Creation:** Images/videos produced
- [ ] **Review:** Content reviewed by [[REVIEWER]]
- [ ] **Approval:** Client approval obtained
- [ ] **Scheduling:** Added to scheduling tool
- [ ] **Posted:** Live on platform
- [ ] **Engagement:** Responded to initial comments
- [ ] **Analysis:** Performance reviewed after 48 hours
